name: Newhouse's Perfect Storm
description: John Newhouse's 1996 debut was nothing short of spectacular, but a series of misfortunes robbed him of a genuine title shot. Australia, Brazil, Monaco: three races, three heartbreaks. This scenario corrects those cruel twists of fate, putting him 1 point ahead with 4 races to go. Now it's up to you to prove that Newhouse could have won it all in his first year.
